entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The primary cereal crop studied for grain quality and yield traits

entities.name: BASMATI RICE
entities.description: A specific aromatic variety of rice known for high economic value and quality

entities.name: BASMATI 370
entities.description: A superior quality Basmati rice variety used as a parent in the RIL population

entities.name: PUSA BASMATI 1121
entities.description: A Basmati derived rice variety used as a parent in the RIL population

entities.name: GRAIN SHAPE
entities.description: A physical characteristic of rice grains with high economic value

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITY
entities.description: The nutritional value and quality attributes of rice grains

entities.name: KERNEL ELONGATION
entities.description: The length and elongation of the rice kernel, a key quality trait

entities.name: GRAIN QUALITY
entities.description: Overall quality characteristics of rice grains influencing market price and demand

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: YIELD-ATTRIBUTED TRAITS
entities.description: Traits that contribute to the overall grain yield of the crop

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Regions of the genome associated with a particular quantitative trait

entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEAT
entities.description: A type of polymorphic molecular marker used for genetic mapping

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify specific locations on a chromosome

entities.name: GENETIC MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying the location of genes or markers on a chromosome

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A population generated from a cross used for genetic analysis and QTL mapping

entities.name: CORRELATION STUDIES
entities.description: Statistical analysis used to determine the relationship between different traits

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding technique using molecular markers to select for desired traits

entities.name: EPISTATIC INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The interaction between different genes that influences a phenotypic trait

entities.name: TRANSGRESSIVE SEGREGATION
entities.description: The appearance of offspring with phenotypes exceeding those of the parents

entities.name: RICE CHROMOSOMES
entities.description: The structures carrying the genetic information in rice, spanning 12 chromosomes
